title: Earnings call transcript: Datadog Q1 2026 earnings beat expectations, stock surges
text: Datadog Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript Summary. Financial Performance: Datadog exceeded analyst expectations with revenue 1.01 billion up 32 percent year-over-year beating forecast of 959.9 million. EPS 0.60 surpassing expected 0.51. Stock Performance: Jumped 31.33 percent in pre-market trading. Free Cash Flow 289 million with 29 percent margin. ARR: Exceeded 4 billion for the first time. Key Metrics: Customer base expanded to 33,200 up from 30,500 year-ago. High-value customers 100K plus ARR: 4,550 up 20.7 percent year-over-year. 56 percent of customers now use 4 plus products. Net revenue retention: Low 120s percent. Gross margin 80.2 percent. Management Commentary: CEO Olivier Pomel highlighted strong growth across both AI-native and non-AI customer segments with non-AI revenue accelerating to mid-20s percent growth. Forward Guidance: Q2 2026 Revenue 1.07-1.08 billion, FY 2026 Revenue 4.3-4.34 billion, FY 2026 EPS 2.36-2.44.
